name: chr19_19p13_3_subtelomeric_SD_cluster
description: 19p13.3 distal subtelomeric SD cluster (first ~2 Mb from chr19 p-telomere). chr19 is the most SD-rich autosome by density and the 19p subtelomere carries multiple interspersed duplicon blocks shared with other subtelomeric regions, with the WASH gene family, FAM138 and DUX4-like paralogs nearby.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of 5-50 kb subtelomeric duplicons at 95-99% identity shared with multiple other subtelomeres (1p, 4p, 16p, Xp); WASH paralog at the chromosome cap; abundant short intra-chromosomal SDs.
